hero_heading: A community of real people living in Uruguay.
hero_desc: We’re not a travel forum. We’re expats, nomads, and immigrants who chose to stay—and we want to make your arrival easier than ours was.
groups_desc: People stay in the community because they find others with similar interests—not just Wi-Fi.
group_sports_desc: Soccer, running, yoga, padel, urban cycling, and more.
group_social_desc: Language exchanges, community barbecues, tango, and cultural outings.
group_professional_desc: For entrepreneurs, freelancers, and remote workers.
group_life_desc: Newcomers in general, families, women, and people looking for roommates.
platforms_desc: We're right where you are—without forcing you to use a platform you don't use.
carousel_heading: Real people living their lives here
quote_martina: I arrived without knowing anyone. Within two weeks, I already had a running group, coworkers, and two friends to join me for a barbecue over the weekend.
quote_carlos: NomadUY helped me find an apartment, figure out the residency process, and connect with other freelancers—all within the same week.
features_desc: Free forever. Premium later for those who want more.
feature_whatsapp_desc: Instant access to topic-based groups: housing, employment, legal, and newcomers.
feature_events_desc: The first Thursday of every month in Montevideo. The event that builds a real community.
feature_events_items: Rotating venues in Pocitos and Palermo
feature_forum_desc: A place to ask questions and share experiences about living in Uruguay.
feature_map_desc: Interactive map showing the community in Uruguay and around the world.
feature_map_items: Map of coworking spaces and cafés
feature_pdf_desc: "Your First 48 Hours in Uruguay" — downloadable, works without an internet connection.
feature_pdf_items: 18 steps listed in order of priority
feature_newsletter_desc: Once a month: legal updates, events, and new guidelines.
form_error_duplicate: This email address is already registered. Are you already part of the community?
form_privacy: No spam. Join our WhatsApp group.
form_success_msg: You're now part of the community. We'll send you a welcome email shortly.
events_heading: Events that build a real sense of community.
events_desc: We meet in person every month. On the first Thursday of every month in Montevideo—at different venues, always in a friendly atmosphere.
events_empty: There are no upcoming events listed yet.
